description_long: This object is a classic Atari-style joystick controller, featuring a tall, cylindrical black stick mounted on a square black base. The base is textured and slightly beveled, with a single prominent red button located in one corner. Around the base of the stick, there is a circular pattern with orange markings and the Atari logo, giving it a retro appearance. The stick itself is made of hard plastic and is designed to be gripped and moved in multiple directions for input. The red button is slightly raised and easily accessible for quick presses. This type of controller is typically used for video game consoles and is recognized for its simple, robust design.
description: A retro black joystick controller with a tall stick and a single red button on a square base, featuring orange markings and the Atari logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the joystick centered and the red button on the left side of the base.
description_view_1: Rear view with the joystick centered and the red button now on the right side, orange markings and logo visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the red button in the front right corner, joystick and circular markings clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the red button in the front left corner, joystick and base details visible.
